attributes.action: Govt to summon the US Ambassdor for causing pain and distress GB citizens
attributes.additional_details: The British Government has to uphold the International Law, and demonstrate to the nation that it can hold its own self to our values of truth and justice both in words and in practise.
attributes.background: We need our Government to rebuke the American actions in the Middle East, condemn its unprovoked and illegal attack on Iran whilst endangering, disrupting and distressing the lives of millions of ordinary British Citizens and making statements tantamount to war crimes and crimes against humanity

rejection.details:
Petitions need to call on the Government or Parliament to take a specific action.

We're not sure exactly what you'd like the Government or Parliament to do.

You could start a new petition explaining clearly what you would like the Government or Parliament to do.

You may wish to sign the following:

Withdraw involvement in war on Iran and seek diplomatic resolution: https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions/761718
